input_text: Dentist appointment Process. Consider medication review.
NL_requirements: The system receives the medicationHistory data object.
The dentist must execute the review medication activity.
The medication review must occur before the treatment is performed.
If a medication conflict is detected (medicationConflict == true), the treatment must not be performed.
The dentist must execute the perform treatment activity.
The treatment must eventually be followed by processing the payment.
If the payment processing fails, the system must record a pendingBalance.
The system sends an appointmentConfirmation after the appointment is scheduled.
The patient arrival must be recorded before the medication review takes place.
The treatment must be performed within 1800 seconds of the medication review.
